payload.gap_text: Due to employee movements, resulting from the transformation, all utilization goals will require recalculation to be provided later.
payload.missing_information: Utilization goals not yet recalculated due to transformation-related employee movements

payload.claim_text: Internal EEO complaints by bases: Race/Color 28%, Sexual Harassment 13%, Gender 13%, National Origin 13%, Retaliation 13%, Other 13%, Disability 7%, Age 0%, Religion 0%
External EEO complaints by bases: Disability 100%

tool_args.label: Most Frequently Cited Internal EEO Basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis internally was race/color
Title VI discrimination complaints by bases: RACE 67%, COLOR 11%, Religion 11%, Age 11%. 7 complaints citing 9 separate bases: race (6); color (1); age (1); religion (1).

tool_args.label: Title VI Most Frequently Cited Basis

payload.claim_text: The most frequently cited basis was race

tool_args.label: LIRR Title VI Complaints Filed Count
